description: Lincoln, ignoring orders, injects himself with the untested antitoxin. Fitz and Simmons rush to respond as Lincoln's body reacts violently, causing a dangerous surge of his electrical powers and knocking him unconscious. The scene is chaotic and highlights both the recklessness and desperation in the team’s fight to save Daisy.

transcript.line: Jemma, are we good after, you know, our disagreement?
Oh, yeah, of course we're good. If I wanted a boyfriend who agreed with everything I said, I never would have broken up with Milton.
Ah. Milton! He was the absolute worst, what with his stupid, fat cabbage head of his. “Hi. I'm... Hi. I'm Milton.”
More like a Brussels sprout, really. But Milton's odd-shaped head aside, we should make a point to never let work disagreements affect our relationship outside of work.
Couldn't agree more, Simmons, especially since we both know who tends to be right most of the time.
Oh, I assume you're referring to the one who finished top of our class at S.H.I.E.L.D. Academy.
Now, that is a sore point, because we both know that if I'd just stayed up and studied all night...
Lincoln.
I'm tired of arguing.
Lincoln, no!
Lincoln. Hey. Lincoln. Look at me. Look at me!
I just want to help.
This is an elixir, and it will hopefully counter the antitoxin.
N-No. It's gonna work.
We don't have time for this. Your body is shutting down.
I can handle it. Please, just let me do this.
You got eyes on this, Coulson?
Affirmative.
There's no sign of Hive anywhere.
We don't have time to search the entire town.
